name: hermes-forge

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-app-version.mjs && prisma generate && next build
scripts.test: node --import ./scripts/test-register.mjs --experimental-strip-types --test tests/unit/home-prompt.test.ts tests/unit/process-md.test.ts tests/unit/io-shape.test.ts tests/unit/foundation.test.ts tests/unit/foundation-extract.test.ts tests/unit/god-mode-view.test.ts tests/unit/process-links.test.ts tests/unit/plant-apply.test.ts tests/unit/plant-layout.test.ts tests/unit/workflow-templates.test.ts tests/unit/business-log-types.test.ts tests/unit/export-filename.test.ts tests/unit/personnel-context.test.ts tests/unit/chatbar-residency.test.ts tests/unit/pending-studio-reply.test.ts tests/unit/studio-prompt.test.ts tests/unit/context-protocol.test.ts tests/unit/context-scope.test.ts tests/unit/composer-state.test.ts tests/unit/runtime-events.test.ts tests/unit/process-session.test.ts tests/unit/context-meter.test.ts tests/unit/capabilities-diagnostics.test.ts tests/unit/forge-tabs.test.ts tests/unit/forge-fetch.test.ts tests/unit/forge-tabs-order.test.ts tests/unit/documents.test.ts tests/unit/business-git-repo-files.test.ts tests/unit/automation-deploy.test.ts tests/unit/automation-run-health.test.ts tests/unit/forge-stage.test.ts tests/unit/forge-room-readiness.test.ts tests/unit/content-ingest.test.ts tests/unit/automation-session.test.ts tests/unit/lifecycle-process-status.test.ts tests/unit/decision-propose-options.test.ts tests/unit/conversation-fork.test.ts tests/unit/overlord-slug.test.ts tests/unit/overlord-paths.test.ts tests/unit/overlord-spawn.test.ts tests/unit/overlord-user.test.ts
scripts.desktop:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3847 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host ('Stopped process ' + $p + ' on port 3847') } else { Write-Host 'No listener on port 3847' }"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:prebuild && npm run build && npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder

description: Agent-native business process mapping studio powered by Hermes Agent
author: Hermes Forge
